title: ML INTERN
description:
Company Description
 Chordy.ai transforms real-world conversations into a living, searchable memory by capturing spoken moments and converting them into usable formats such as transcripts, summaries, decisions, and action items. It organizes context over time, allowing users to recall details from their history, such as past discussions or commitments. Designed to help users stay present, Chordy.ai offers clear control and tools that ensure follow-through on actions and decisions. The platform empowers users to effortlessly manage conversations and their outcomes for better productivity.

 Role Description
 This is a remote internship opportunity for an ML Intern at Chordy.ai. The intern will assist in developing, training, and fine-tuning machine learning models to enhance transcription, summarization, and contextual linkage capabilities. Responsibilities include data preparation, algorithm development, model evaluation, and collaborating with the engineering team to integrate solutions into the platform.

 Qualifications
  Strong understanding of Machine Learning concepts, Algorithms, and Natural Language Processing (NLP).
Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, TensorFlow, or PyTorch for ML model development.
Experience with data preprocessing, analysis, and visualization using tools such as Pandas and NumPy.
Familiarity with deep learning frameworks and large language models (LLMs) is a plus.
Excellent problem-solving skills and a proactive approach to learning and experimentation.
Good communication and collaboration skills for working with cross-functional teams.
Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field.

title: AgriVaidic Internship
description:
About AgriVaidic
AgriVaidic is curated to integrate Agriculture, FMCG, Food technology, Nutrition Management, culinary, Yoga & wellness verticals to develop a healthy lifestyle. An initiative to help bring direct farm produce to home in the most sustainable and organic way. This is an incredible opportunity for any candidate to develop a first hand understanding of a young startup.

About the Internship
We’re looking for interns who have a deep understanding of agricultural and food processing practices and novel food technological ideas that can be tapped to harness benefits. They must work to help develop healthy, safe, and convenient food products. They should work to develop better methods of food preservation, better processing and packaging procedures, better storage and even better delivery processes. They must also research harmful food additives and develop substitutes in order to make sure foods are safe and healthy.

Who can apply
A foodie who has a passion towards FMCG or FoodTech, a zeal to learn while building entrepreneurial spirit, and is looking at utilizing skills for serving cultivators of the land
Generating new product ideas and recipes and modifying and improving existing recipes
Designing processes and machinery for the production of recipes on a large scale
Liaising with marketing staff
Ensuring that strict hygiene food safety standards are met
Identifying and choosing products from suppliers
Testing and examining samples
Writing reports.
Individuals with relevant skills and knowledge about the food and agro industries

Certificate of completion - Internship
Flexible work days and work hours
The internship will be without any remuneration but a platform for immense learning 
No geographical limits, candidates can work from anywhere

title: Google Tag Manager Freelancer / Fresher
description:
Company Description
Perfect Pixel specialises in advanced digital analytics and conversion tracking to enhance online performance for businesses. With over a decade of experience, the company has completed 500+ successful full-stack implementations across industries. Their expertise includes Google Tag Manager (GTM), Google Analytics 4 (GA4) migrations and reporting, as well as Google Ads conversion tracking. Perfect Pixel is known for creating custom dashboards with Looker Studio and providing tailored solutions for e-commerce and marketing data optimisation. The company is committed to improving conversion rates and ROI through precise ad performance tracking and streamlined data management.

Role Description
This is a part-time remote role for a Google Tag Manager Freelancer/Fresher. The successful candidate will assist with implementing GTM setups, configuring tracking tags, and analysing marketing and web data. Day-to-day responsibilities include setting up event tracking, migrating Universal Analytics to GA4, evaluating data accuracy, and providing troubleshooting support. Additionally, the candidate will work with the team to improve GA4 reporting, e-commerce tracking, and DataLayer architecture to meet client needs.

Qualifications
Proficiency in Google Tag Manager (GTM) and GA4, including basic implementation and configuration
Basic knowledge of web analytics, e-commerce tracking, and event tracking
Understanding of digital marketing concepts, such as Google Ads, Meta Ads, and Bing Ads
Additional knowledge in Looker Studio, Google Business Profile, or DataLayer architecture is a plus

title: Hardware Engineer Intern with verification
description:

IBM Systems division builds Servers, Storage and Systems Software which are the building blocks for

next-generation IT infrastructure of enterprise customers and data centers. IBM Servers provide best-

in-class reliability, scalability, performance, and end-to-end security to handle mission-critical

workloads and provide seamless extension to hybrid multi cloud environments.

India Systems Development Lab (ISDL) is part of word-wide IBM Systems division. Established in

1996, the ISDL Lab is headquartered in Bengaluru, with presence in Pune and Hyderabad as well.

ISDL teams work across the IBM Systems stack including Processor development, Firmware,

Operating Systems, Systems Software, Storage Software, Cloud Software, Performance Engineering,

System Test etc. The ISDL teams also ushered in new development models such as Agile, Design

Thinking and DevOps.

Enterprise Systems development Lab – part of ISDL, has Internship & Job opportunities in the

Design & Development of Processors for IBM Mainframe & Power systems.

If you have a degree in VLSI design or electronics and looking for building a career in hardware

aspects of the processor development, have skills / interested in the Processor core development,

Logic Design, Analog circuits, Physical Design, Custom layout, Memory & Library characterization.

Computer Science graduates interested in the design and development of algorithms to verify /

validate and debug the processor Architecture & Performance

Your Role And Responsibilities

IBM Systems development lab works on the development of

latest generation processors that power the IBM Z Systems

(Mainframe) & IBM Power Systems.

The Enterprise Systems Development team in Bangalore is a

microcosm of the global Systems development lab. As a

member of the ESD team you will have an opportunity to work

on the Design/ Verification/ Pre Silicon Validation / Physical

design/ EDA / Library/ Memory characterization/ Post silicon

validation of the Processor chip that is being developed in the

latest technologies of 5nm , 3nm & Beyond.

Required Technical And Professional Expertise

Skills required

 Digital Logic design, Computer Architecture, RISC V

or other processor pipeline knowledge, VLSI design

flow and process knowledge, Good understanding of

Preferred Technical And Professional Experience

Good programming and scripting ( Python/ Perl) skills

are highly desired

Academics

Master’s Degree in VLSI design / Electronics / Computer Science engineering or other relevant

specializations in Hardware.

title: Full Stack Engineer Intern
description:
Full Stack Engineer Intern 

6-Month Full-Time Internship
Location: Lajpat Nagar, New Delhi
Stipend: 10,000 INR for Full Time 
High performers may be considered for full-time role post internship

Louder is an entertainment company building next-generation ticketing and digital products for live experiences, with its Head Office in Lajpat Nagar, New Delhi.

We’re looking for Full Stack Engineer Intern who can build, scale, and ship fast — working across our AI-powered entertainment ticketing system, seat-map modules, event management ai modules and other digital projects.

You’ll work directly with the founding team, managing core product development and digital initiatives that power our ticketing platform and client experiences.

In this role, you’ll own features end-to-end — from designing and implementing front-end interfaces with React and Next.js to building robust back-end services in Node.js or Python. You’ll design and integrate APIs, connect AI models like Gemini and OpenAI, and implement custom LLM workflows in production. If you enjoy building data-rich, AI-powered systems, experimenting with cutting-edge tech, and turning ideas into real products — this is the place for you.

What You’ll Do

Develop and maintain Louder’s ticketing and event management products, including a PHP-based ticketing system.
Design, build, and deploy full-stack web applications using React, Next.js, Node.js, and modern frameworks.
Integrate and work with AI tools and APIs (OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic) to fast-track product development.
Collaborate across design, marketing, and product teams to build and enhance digital experiences.
Work with databases (MongoDB, SQL/NoSQL) and integrate third-party APIs.
Manage timelines, priorities, and feature delivery across multiple digital projects.

What We’re Looking For

12 Months of hands-on full-stack development internship experience.
Proficiency in React, Next.js, Node.js, PHP, and database management (SQL/NoSQL).
Ability to own projects end-to-end — from idea to deployment.
Familiarity with AI frameworks, SDKs, or tools for rapid application development.
Excellent problem-solving, debugging, and cross-functional collaboration skills.

Preferred / Bonus Skills

Experience in an early-stage startup or founder-like environment.
Exposure to LangChain, LangFlow, or similar AI-agent frameworks.
Demonstrated ability to build impactful products from scratch.
Startup & ownership mindset — adaptable, resourceful, and able to ship fast.

Why Join Louder

Build products shaping the future of live entertainment and ticketing.
Work directly with founders in a fast-paced, no-bureaucracy environment.
Be part of a creative tech team working at the intersection of AI, events, and digital innovation.

title: IT Intern – Gadget & Tech Support Operations with verification
description:
Instawork is on a mission to create meaningful economic opportunities for skilled hourly professionals in communities around the globe. Our AI-powered labor marketplace helps local businesses scale, and enables global technology companies to push the frontiers of robotics and AI. Backed by world-class investors like Benchmark, Spark Capital, Craft Ventures, Greylock, Y Combinator, and others, we’re looking for exceptional talent to reimagine the way the world works.

Location: Kormangala, Bangalore

Role Overview

The IT Intern will be responsible for end-to-end handling, setup, troubleshooting, and maintenance of IT gadgets used by Data Collectors (DCs) and Internal Coordinators (ICs). This role is critical to ensure uninterrupted video data collection operations through effective gadget management and timely tech support.

Shifts - ( Multiple Morning & night shifts) Process runs 24/7

Key Responsibilities

Handle and manage IT gadgets including iPhones, SD cards, and SD card readers
Set up and manage Apple IDs / Apple accounts on iPhones as per project requirements
Perform basic to advanced troubleshooting for iPhone, SD card, and data transfer issues
Upload video data from SD cards to rigs/systems, ensuring data integrity
Format SD cards post data upload following defined SOPs
Ensure gadgets are ready for deployment and functioning before handover
Coordinate with Inventory / Ops teams for gadget availability and readiness
Stay updated with new tech, iOS updates, device-related changes, and best practices
Cascade tech updates, changes, and guidelines clearly to ICs and DCs
Support ICs and DCs during live operations in case of technical failures
Maintain basic logs or trackers related to gadget issues and resolutions


Required Skills & Competencies

Strong hands-on knowledge of iPhones and iOS ecosystem
Experience or familiarity with Apple ID creation and management
Basic understanding of data transfer, storage devices, and formatting
Good troubleshooting and problem-solving skills
Comfortable working with multiple devices simultaneously
Ability to explain technical concepts clearly to non-technical users
Quick learner with interest in keeping up with tech updates
Basic knowledge of Google Sheets or trackers is a plus


Preferred Profile

IT / Computer Science / Electronics student or recent graduate
Prior experience handling mobile devices or tech support is an advantage
Detail-oriented and process-driven
Comfortable working in fast-paced, operations-heavy environments


Outcome Expectations

Zero or minimal downtime due to gadget or tech issues
Smooth data uploads and secure handling of collected data
IC and DC teams stay informed and aligned on tech-related updates


Our Values 

Empathy, Trust & Candor We put ourselves in the shoes of our colleagues and customers and don’t shy away from uncomfortable conversations, instead building trust through honest and direct feedback. 
Bias for Action We practice high-velocity decision-making, clear-eyed that we often operate with incomplete information. Growing quickly means it’s OK to be wrong, so long as we learn from our mistakes and course correct! 
Always Be Learning We’re a curious bunch, and with AI transforming our workplace we encourage everyone to learn from each other, compounding our knowledge and experience to help us change an entire industry. 
Act Like an Owner We work long, hard, and smart, building products that delight our users and drive growth. Your ability to impact Instawork is limited only by your courage and conviction, not your job description. 


About Instawork

Founded in 2015, Instawork is the nation’s leading online labor marketplace for food services, hospitality, light industry, and logistics, connecting more than 7M skilled workers with local restaurants, hotels, warehouses, stadiums, and more. Our AI-powered platform serves thousands of businesses across more than 50 major markets in the United States and Canada. We're not just helping fill shifts, we're supporting local economies—and we're just getting started!

Instawork has been featured by CBS News, The Wall Street Journal, The Washington Post, and the Associated Press. Forbes included us on their Next Billion Dollar Startups list; RetailTech Breakthrough named us Workforce Hiring Solution of the Year for 2025; and Inc. 5000 recognized us as one of the country's top 10% fastest-growing companies two years in a row. But what matters most is our impact. We're solving real problems for real people, and we’re doing it at scale.

Join our team to help us build something that matters! We’re looking for superstars who want to help us shape the future of work. With hubs in San Francisco, Bangalore, and Chicago, city offices in New York, Phoenix, and Singapore, we're back to working together in-person five days a week because we believe the best ideas happen when great people collaborate face-to-face. We also value diverse perspectives and encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds.

Ready to make an impact? Learn more at www.instawork.com/about.

Personnel Privacy Policy

title: Machine Learning Engineer Master's (Intern)- India Engineering/ Splunk / UHR with verification
description:
Please note this posting is to advertise potential job opportunities. This exact role may not be open today but could open in the near future. When you apply, a Cisco representative may contact you directly if a relevant position opens.

Meet the Team

At Cisco, AI isn’t just a technology—it’s a movement. Our AI teams are shaping the future by embedding intelligence into collaboration, networking, security, observability, and beyond. Our teams focus on building next-generation businesses powered by AI. We are a forward-thinking team of engineers, researchers, and innovators working at the intersection of deep learning, generative AI, and cutting-edge product design. The vibe is fast-paced, entrepreneurial, and collaborative, where every day offers the opportunity to create meaningful solutions with massive global impact.

Your Impact

As a Machine Learning Engineer, you will be at the forefront of Cisco’s generative AI strategy. You will design, train, and optimize large language models (LLMs) and multimodal AI systems to address ambitious real-world challenges across industries. You will drive innovation by developing scalable, high-performing AI solutions, collaborating across engineering and product teams, and guiding research into emerging technologies. Success in this role means delivering impactful AI capabilities that transform Cisco’s products and customer experiences while mentoring peers and evangelizing AI innovation both inside and outside the company.

Minimum Qualifications

Students graduating in 2027
Programming experience with Java, C++, Python, or related languages
Hands-on experience in natural language processing, computer vision, or multimodal interaction.
Experience using deep learning frameworks to train, fine-tune, and optimize GenAI models for performance and scalability.
Experience designing and deploying proof-of-concepts and production-ready AI systems. 

Preferred Qualifications

Strong background in system design, software development, and production deployment at scale.
Ability to transform ambiguous requirements into actionable deep learning solutions.
Familiarity with state-of-the-art models and methods (e.g., CLIP, DALLE 2, diffusion models).
Demonstrated contributions to the AI/ML community through top-tier publications, open-source projects, or leaderboard competitions.

Why Cisco?

At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.

Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.

We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.
